title: Track + verify external reuse events
context: OER are abundant and free but are not indexed against the curriculum standards that govern what teachers must teach, so teachers cannot find the free resource aligned to a given standard. This project builds an open crosswalk of educator-reviewed AlignmentRecords linking OER to standards by stable identifier (CASE GUID / ASN URI), not by reproducing copyrighted standards text. Two hard gates never skip: the dual licence/terms gate (gate-002) and educator review of every record, with a blind second-reviewer precision audit holding precision at >= 95%. Success is outcomes delivered to real beneficiaries; this tracks verifiable external reuse, excluding self-reported use.
objective: Track and verify external reuse events of the crosswalk and record them in the outcome ledger.
acceptanceCriteria: >= 2 verifiable external reuse events recorded (ingestion commit/permalink, catalog page, written confirmation, or third-party fork/citation); self-reported use excluded.
Each event has a verifiable artifact link recorded in the outcome ledger.
Output licensed CC-BY-4.0; the commit is DCO signed-off.
